messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "096321a9-bf8d-4f68-8d32-553ce8ba9176", "article_id": "25877eb8-1478-4620-8572-9e586f516986", "source_name": "Refinery29", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "trending_product_mention", "brand": "Madewell", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["trending Madewell styles like barrel jeans", "trending barrel-leg jeans"], "anchor_json": {"trend_season": "spring 2026", "product_variant": "barrel-leg / barrel jeans", "promotional_context": "featured in sale event", "brand": "Madewell"}}, {"event_frame_id": "28906a7b-f396-42ec-8fbd-207936da7fe4", "article_id": "25877eb8-1478-4620-8572-9e586f516986", "source_name": "Refinery29", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "trending_product_mention", "brand": "Madewell", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["trending Madewell styles like... woven handbags", "woven handbags"], "anchor_json": {"trend_season": "spring 2026", "product_material": "woven", "product_type": "handbags", "promotional_context": "featured in sale event", "brand": "Madewell"}}, {"event_frame_id": "e43751e6-256b-45d7-a293-cf8e871a589c", "article_id": "25877eb8-1478-4620-8572-9e586f516986", "source_name": "Refinery29", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "brand_sale_event", "brand": "Madewell", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["save 25% off nearly everything during the latest Madewell sale", "Madewell's Insiders Event"], "anchor_json": {"event_id": "madewell_insider_sale_2026_march", "temporal_scope": "bi-annual mega sale", "applicable_items": "new arrivals, bestsellers, trending styles like barrel jeans and woven handbags", "brand": "Madewell"}}]}
